_comment: Project now subscribes to the ai-team plugin (per ADR-0015). The plugin ships the hook scripts, subagent definitions, and slash commands. This file only carries: (1) the marketplace subscription so the project is self-documenting, (2) the permissions block (plugin settings.json cannot ship permissions per Claude Code's plugin spec). When the workspace is published to GitHub, swap the directory source for {"source": "github", "repo": "jaetill/agentic-dev-environment"}.
